name: Tetsuya Masuda
title: Chief Executive Officer & Head of Investments
bio: Seasoned investment executive with 27 years managing institutional capital. Co-founder of Meridian Global Holdings, overseeing $280B across multiple investment strategies with focus on long-term value creation.

name: Yuki Tanaka
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Leads all investment decisions across equities, fixed income, and alternatives. 24 years of institutional investment experience with track record of outperformance across market cycles.

name: Hiroshi Yamamoto
title: Head of Equity Research
bio: Directs 28-person equity research team covering fundamental analysis across 40+ sectors. Pioneered proprietary quantitative models for stock selection and portfolio optimization.

name: Akira Suzuki
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Global Equities
bio: Manages $95B global equity portfolio with expertise in developed and emerging markets. 19 years track record of consistent alpha generation through disciplined value investing.

name: Kenji Nakamura
title: Head of Fixed Income
bio: Oversees $65B fixed income platform including corporate bonds, government securities, and structured credit. 21 years credit analysis expertise with deep issuer relationships globally.

name: Masako Yamada
title: Portfolio Manager - Derivatives & Alternatives
bio: Manages $45B in derivative strategies and hedge funds. Expert in complex structured products, volatility trading, and absolute return strategies with 17 years experience.

name: Takeshi Harada
title: Head of Alternative Investments
bio: Leads private equity and hedge fund investments generating $35B in uncorrelated returns. 20 years in alternative asset allocation with strong track record in fund selection and sourcing.

name: Sakura Kimura
title: Equity Analyst - Technology & Growth
bio: Senior technology analyst with 12 years identifying disruptive innovation opportunities. Specialized expertise in software, semiconductors, and digital transformation investment themes.

name: Noboru Ito
title: Fixed Income Analyst - Credit Research
bio: Leads credit research team analyzing 500+ corporate and emerging market credit issuers. 15 years credit analysis expertise with focus on identifying distressed and high-yield opportunities.

name: Yuki Saito
title: Risk Manager
bio: Manages enterprise risk framework for $280B portfolio. PhD in Financial Engineering with expertise in portfolio risk modeling, stress testing, and regulatory capital management.
